events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need reason. Scenario: plenum vs riser cable in wrong space. Residential job, data/comm/security, rough-complete. Plenum cable required in plenum spaces (air handling), riser rated for vertical shafts. If wrong cable in wrong space, non-compliant, fire/smoke hazard. Decision fail. Risk high/critical? Plenum space wrong cable can spread fire/toxic smoke; critical maybe. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 70. Value not numeric reading; set 0. Confidence high 0.95. Findings: installed riser-rated cable in plenum space / plenum cable in riser? The observed condition is plenum vs riser cable in wrong space. We'll phrase generically: communications cable installed with incorrect fire-resistance rating for the space (e.g., riser cable in plenum or plenum cable in riser), violates NEC 800.113 and TIA-568 cable placement. Actions: remove/replace with properly rated cable for space; verify markings CMP/CMR etc. References: NEC 800.113, TIA-568. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside.
